 {"id":"flywheel_connectors-9c0","title":"fcp.figma: File and project listing API","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2026-01-11T10:14:46.100340955-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-11T10:14:46.100340955-05:00"}
 {"id":"flywheel_connectors-9cg","title":"fcp.twilio: WhatsApp Business API integration","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2026-01-11T10:14:49.306233445-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-11T10:14:49.306233445-05:00"}
-{"id":"flywheel_connectors-9co","title":"fcp-streaming: Shared Streaming and SSE Library","description":"# fcp-streaming: Shared Streaming and SSE Library

## Overview
Unified streaming library for SSE, WebSocket, and long-polling patterns used by connectors requiring real-time data.

## Server-Sent Events (SSE)
- RFC 6455 compliant parsing
- Event types (data, event, id, retry)
- Multi-line data handling
- Last-Event-ID for reconnection
- Automatic reconnection with backoff

## WebSocket Support
- Full WebSocket protocol
- Text and binary message support
- Ping/pong heartbeat
- Graceful close handling
- Automatic reconnection

## Long Polling
- Configurable poll interval
- Response streaming
- Timeout handling
- Cursor/offset tracking

## Stream Processing
- Async stream primitives
- Backpressure handling
- Buffer management
- Stream cancellation
- Event batching

## Error Recovery
- Automatic reconnection
- Configurable retry policies
- Event replay from last ID
- Partial message handling

## Performance
- Zero-copy parsing where possible
- Memory limits per stream
- Connection pooling

## Dependencies
- tokio, tokio-tungstenite, reqwest
- futures-util, pin-project
- fcp-core","status":"open","priority":0,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2026-01-11T10:39:27.418127178-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-11T12:22:29.89991528-05:00"}
